game.js:349 Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'

get rid of dev mode, and fix this bug its causes the game to not load
analysis:
- Issue identified: The game fails to load due to two issues. First, `index.html` tries to load `dev_mode.js` which does not exist (404 error). Second, `game.js` contains invalid characters/tags at the very end of the file (`</code...`), causing a syntax error "Unexpected token '<'".
- Files affected: `index.html`, `game.js`
- Changes needed: 
  1. In `index.html`, remove the `<script src="../../dev_mode.js"></script>` line to remove the dependency on the missing file.
  2. In `game.js`, remove the trailing garbage text/tags after the final export statement to fix the syntax error.
